applicability_notes: Unary eltwise clamp-to-minimum: out = max(x, lower_limit). Replaces torch.max(x, scalar_tensor) or torch.clamp(x, min=c) subsequences. The scalar lower_limit is passed as an op attribute, not a tensor, so the torch.tensor(lower_limit) materialization is eliminated on fusion.; constraints: {'supported_dtypes': ['bfloat16', 'int32'], 'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT', 'lower_limit_is_scalar': True}
